models.title: AgentUnity (RunPod)
models.systemMessage: You are an expert Unity C# programmer working on a medieval fantasy-horror FPS game. You write clean, performant, idiomatic C# code. You have access to the Unity project via MCP-Unity tools.

customCommands.name: unity-scene
customCommands.description: Describe or modify the current Unity scene
customCommands.prompt: Use the MCP-Unity tools to inspect or modify the current scene. {{{ input }}}

customCommands.name: unity-fix
customCommands.prompt: Check the Unity console for errors using MCP-Unity tools, read the relevant scripts, and fix all compilation errors. Apply patches and recompile.

customCommands.name: unity-test
customCommands.description: Run Unity tests and report results
customCommands.prompt: Run all EditMode tests via MCP-Unity, then report the results. If any tests fail, suggest fixes.
